summary: Multi-exchange order book aggregation testing completed. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend verified showing Exchange Consensus, Exchange Depth, and Aggregated data sources from Kraken, Coinbase, and Bitstamp. Fixed a bug where exchange_stats.imbalance was not being calculated in aggregate_orderbooks function.
passed_tests: /api/exchange-comparison returns data from all 3 exchanges (Kraken, Coinbase, Bitstamp) with price, bid, ask, spread, imbalance, and bias
/api/support-resistance shows 'Aggregated (Kraken, Coinbase, Bitstamp)' as data source and includes explanation text in levels
/api/liquidity shows aggregated data source, exchange_stats per exchange with imbalance, and explanation text in clusters
/api/whale-alerts returns proper structure (no alerts detected - expected behavior)
/api/patterns returns proper structure (no patterns detected - expected behavior)
/api/market/bias includes exchange_consensus showing per-exchange bias (Kraken: BULLISH, Coinbase: NEUTRAL, Bitstamp: BEARISH)
Dashboard loads correctly with Exchange Consensus section in Market Bias card
Liquidity page shows Exchange Depth comparison section with per-exchange imbalance percentages
Support & Resistance page shows aggregated data source
All navigation between pages works correctly
Live price streaming via WebSocket working ($70,320.80)
Order Book card shows Aggregated (Kraken, Coinbase, Bitstamp) source
Open Interest card shows CoinGlass data ($47.25B)
Funding Rate card shows CoinGlass (Liquidation-derived) data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-exchange aggregation from Kraken, Coinbase, and Bitstamp is fully functional. Fixed bug where exchange_stats.imbalance was missing - now calculated in aggregate_orderbooks function. All cards display aggregated data sources correctly. Whale Alerts and Patterns may show 'no signals detected' if market conditions don't trigger thresholds.

bug_fix_applied.issue: exchange_stats missing 'imbalance' field which frontend expected for Exchange Depth display
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added imbalance calculation: ((bid_depth - ask_depth) / total * 100) to exchange_stats in aggregate_orderbooks function
